title: Monitoring alert banner readability
description: Fix the Monitoring page layout so the table heading does not bleed into data rows when alert notifications are visible, and render each alert notification as a separate themed item using the agent hostname when known.
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring table headers stay attached to the table and do not overlay values below after the alert banner appears.
Monitoring alert notifications display hostnames for known agents instead of GUIDs.
Each monitoring alert notification is rendered as its own themed visual item so multiple alerts are clearly separated.
Dashboard tests cover hostname-based alert display data.
Docs, CHANGELOG.md, and MODULE.bazel are updated.

tasks.title: Render alert notifications with display identities
tasks.description: Use the existing display alert enrichment for Monitoring alert notifications and render each alert as a separate themed element.
acceptance_criteria: The alert strip uses toDisplayAlerts(alerts, agents) rather than raw AlertRecord data.
Each alert item includes the display hostname and secondary agent id.
The alert item is themed by severity.

unit: Keep or extend dashboard/src/status.test.ts coverage proving display alerts resolve known agent hostnames and retain ids.

tasks.implementation_notes: Modify dashboard/src/main.tsx alert-strip rendering. Reuse AgentIdentity to keep hostname/id presentation consistent.

tasks.title: Fix Monitoring table header layout
tasks.description: Adjust dashboard CSS so Monitoring table headers do not remain sticky at a stale offset and overlap content when alert banners change page layout.
acceptance_criteria: Monitoring table header cells are positioned normally inside the table.
Alert strip items have clear spacing, borders, and severity color treatment.
Responsive layout keeps alert items readable without overlapping the table.

integration: Run dashboard TypeScript build and focused dashboard tests.

tasks.implementation_notes: Modify dashboard/src/styles.css. Remove the generic sticky positioning from thead th; management-table already overrides it and can remain unchanged. Add alert-card styles.

tasks.title: Document and version the UI fix
tasks.description: Update dashboard documentation, changelog, and module version for the alert notification and header layout fix.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md records the Monitoring alert banner and hostname notification fixes.
Dashboard docs describe hostname-based alert notifications.

nodes.label: Render alert notifications with display identities
Document and version the UI fix

edges.label: CSS depends on final alert markup
